title: psoralea psoralioides var. eglandulosa
intro: Psoralea psoralioides var. eglandulosa, also known as the small or dwarf psoralea, is a plant species in the legume family. It contains a unique compound called psoralen, which has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate cell growth and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Psoralea psoralioides var. eglandulosa include its potential to treat skin conditions such as psoriasis, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and promote overall health. Herbal preparations of Psoralea psoralioides var. eglandulosa may include infusions, teas, or topical creams, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
